_comment: Tier-2 for 4C input format: 4C 2026.3.0-dev only accepts .yaml/.yml/.json input files. The legacy .dat format is rejected with 'Cannot infer format of input file ... Only .yaml, .yml, and .json are supported.' from core/io/src/4C_io_input_file.cpp:428. The bulk of the existing 4C catalog references dat-format section names (TIMEINTEGR, DESIGN SURF NEUMANN, MAT_scatra) — those names are still valid as YAML keys but the OVERALL FILE FORMAT must be YAML/JSON not dat. Verified empirically 2026-06-01.
expect_in_output: Cannot infer format of input file
